name: openhue-hermes-agent-zh
description: Control Philips Hue lights, rooms, and scenes 通过 OpenHue CLI.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 openhue 相關工作
幫我啟用 openhue 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 openhue

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

examples.intent: Use the openhue skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
